# Daily CTO Digest Template

Use this template once per day from the Vision-to-Execution CTO Agent.

```yaml
daily_cto_digest:
  date: <YYYY-MM-DD>
  objective_focus:
    - <top priority objective>
  overall_health: <GREEN|AMBER|RED>
  key_decisions_needed:
    - <decision and deadline>
  gate_status:
    requirement_gate: <GREEN|AMBER|RED>
    ux_gate: <GREEN|AMBER|RED>
    architecture_gate: <GREEN|AMBER|RED>
  progress_today:
    completed:
      - <completed item>
    in_progress:
      - <current item>
  blockers:
    - <blocker, owner, impact>
  top_risks:
    - <risk and mitigation>
  next_24h_actions:
    - <action and owner>
  escalations:
    - <none or escalation target>
```
